text.title: API Versioning Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the spec artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-api-versioning.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.code: { "spec_id": "openapi.yaml", "decision": "create_v_next", "from_version": "v1", "to_version": "v2", "deprecation_date": "2026-06-01", "sunset_date": "2026-12-01", "rationale": "Removed email_verified field; breaking diff ids: response-property-removed.", "breaking_diff_ids": [ "response-property-removed" ] }
example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: Missing required spec_id and rationale; decision enum violation; from_version pattern violation.
